description: Plan, implement, review, fix, and re-review feature work with one writer

lines: Create a concise implementation plan for: {input}
- likely edit surfaces and tests to inspect
- validation contract based on the project, not generic guesses
- risks or decisions that would require user approval
Implement the planned feature work for: {input}
- You are the only writer for this implementation phase.
- Keep edits small, reversible, and inside the approved scope.
- Run the most focused validation available and report commands plus outcomes.
- Stop instead of guessing on product, scope, security, destructive, or externally visible ambiguity.
Apply only the accepted in-scope fixes from the synthesized review verdict.
- You are the only writer for this fix phase.
- Do not apply optional/deferred feedback unless it is tiny, safe, and clearly inside scope.
- Do not make unapproved product, scope, security, destructive, or architecture decisions.
- Run focused validation for the fixes and report commands plus outcomes.
Produce the final build summary for: {input}
Do not delegate to other subagents; use your available read-only tools directly.
- final verdict and whether the work is ready for parent review
- validation evidence and remaining validation gaps
